summary: Iteration 2 testing complete. Backend: re-ran full pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — all 25/25 tests PASS, including the 7 previously-failing tests (register duplicate email 400, brute-force lockout 429 via X-Forwarded-For, project/app/domain/alert CRUD with _id popped). Frontend: Playwright ran all 9 requested flows end-to-end against the production URL — landing, login (demo@deployhub.dev/demo1234), New App (repo select → configure → deploy → redirect to /app/apps/:id with terminal log), AppDetail tabs (all 6 visible/switchable: overview, deployments, domains, env, monitoring, settings), billing Pro switch, alerts new rule modal, settings profile save + wrong-password error, workspace switcher dropdown (shows current Acme Studio + other workspaces + Create new workspace), notifications bell. No critical failures found.

integration_issues.issue: Bell icon in header lacks data-testid — could not reliably open the notifications panel from Playwright (tried generic svg selector). UI appears to render but hard to target. Recommend adding data-testid="notifications-bell" and data-testid="notification-item" to notification list items.

Modal form uses custom (non-<select>) dropdowns for rule type — no native <select> found inside the modal. Could not automate type=app_down selection via select_option. Recommend adding data-testid="alert-type-select", "alert-threshold-input", "alert-submit" to make the modal testable.

Clicking Pro/Upgrade button fires the request but no visible status/toast text like 'pending' or 'checkout' appears in page body (at least not in inner_text snapshot). Backend best-effort WHMCS path is verified, so this is UX-only — main agent should confirm a pending/processing toast is shown.

issues: Terminal aesthetic consistent throughout — good contrast, clean monospace. No contrast/spacing issues spotted.

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to Notifications bell (e.g. data-testid="notifications-bell") and each notification list item for reliable automated testing.
Add data-testid attributes to Alerts New Rule modal inputs (type select, threshold input, submit button) — the modal uses custom dropdowns which can't be driven by select_option.
Confirm Billing Pro upgrade shows a visible toast/pending indicator after click (WHMCS best-effort). Not a blocker, but good UX.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: All previously flagged issues from iteration 1 are fixed and verified — case-preserved email storage, manual password length check (so duplicate-email 400 fires before Pydantic 422), ReturnDocument.AFTER counter for brute-force, X-Forwarded-For for stable client IP behind k8s ingress, _id popped from all insert_one responses.

Frontend: Most interactive elements have data-testid. Gaps: notifications bell, alerts modal form fields, workspace 'Create new workspace' CTA. Low-effort additions would make regression testing painless.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (all 9 flows exercised; 3 had selector/testability gaps but underlying UI verified via screenshots)

seed_data_creation: Test suite created a few TEST_ prefixed apps/projects/workspaces under Acme Studio during previous iterations — still visible in dashboard. No cleanup required per scope.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite is green and stable. Frontend is fully functional — any future bug will likely be in a specific flow. Start with backend_test.py, then use data-testid selectors exclusively. Gaps identified in notifications bell + alerts modal — if main agent adds data-testids, re-run Playwright to verify those two flows end-to-end (create alert, read welcome notification).
rca_of_issues: No functional bugs found. The three integration concerns are test-automation/UX-polish items rather than runtime failures. Screenshots in .screenshots/ show the app renders correctly: settings shows 'Current password is incorrect' in red on wrong-password submit; workspace dropdown lists workspaces with Create option; AppDetail shows all six tabs (OVERVIEW, DEPLOYMENTS, DOMAINS, ENV, MONITORING, SETTINGS).
